about.title: About Pandit Shree Mahadev Joshi
about.subtitle: 20+ Years of Vedic Wisdom & Spiritual Guidance
about.heroTagline: Guiding souls through the cosmic wisdom of Vedic astrology
about.bio1: Pandit Shree Mahadev Joshi is a renowned Vedic astrologer and spiritual consultant based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. With over 20 years of dedicated practice, he has guided thousands of individuals and families through life's most important decisions — from marriage and career to health and spiritual well-being.
about.bio2: Born into a family with deep roots in Vedic traditions, Pandit ji began his study of Jyotish Shastra at a young age under the guidance of revered scholars. His approach combines classical Vedic astrology with an intuitive understanding of modern life challenges, making his consultations both traditionally grounded and practically relevant.
about.bio3: Today, Pandit ji serves clients not only across India — in Ahmedabad, Mumbai, and beyond — but also internationally through online consultations via Zoom and WhatsApp, bringing the ancient wisdom of Vedic astrology to seekers worldwide.

timeline.title: Foundation in Vedic Studies
timeline.description: Began studying Jyotish Shastra and Vedic scriptures under revered Gurujis, building a strong foundation in classical astrology.

timeline.title: Establishing Believe Astrology
timeline.description: Founded Believe Astrology in Ahmedabad, serving the local community with personalized Vedic consultations and spiritual guidance.

timeline.title: National & International Presence
timeline.description: Expanded practice to Mumbai and began serving international clients through online consultations via Zoom and WhatsApp.

timeline.title: 20+ Years of Guiding Souls
timeline.description: Continues to serve thousands of clients across 3 countries with deep, personalized Vedic astrology readings and spiritual healing.

about.philosophy: Astrology is not about predicting a fixed fate, but about understanding the weather of the cosmos so you can sail your boat with wisdom. I believe every soul carries its own light — my role is to help you see it clearly through the ancient lens of Vedic wisdom.

consultationModes.description: Visit our Ahmedabad office for a face-to-face consultation
Connect from anywhere in the world via video consultation
Quick consultations and follow-ups via WhatsApp call

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by thousands across India and worldwide

reviews.name: Rajesh P.
reviews.text: Pandit ji's Kundli reading was incredibly accurate. His guidance on my career transition was spot on. Within 3 months, I found the perfect opportunity.

reviews.name: Priya M.
reviews.text: After years of health issues, Pandit ji recommended specific gemstones and mantras. The change in my energy and well-being has been remarkable.

reviews.name: Amit S.
reviews.text: Even from overseas, the consultation via Zoom was thorough and personal. His Vastu advice for our new home made a real difference.

reviews.name: Meena D.
reviews.text: Pandit ji guided us through our daughter's marriage compatibility analysis. His insights were deep, respectful, and extremely helpful.

reviews.name: Vikram T.
reviews.text: The Maha-Mrutunjay Mantra Anushthan organized by Pandit ji was a deeply spiritual experience. My family felt blessed and protected.

reviews.name: Sunita K.
reviews.text: I was skeptical at first, but the accuracy of the horoscope analysis won me over. Pandit ji explains everything with patience and clarity.
